mapper.select: SELECT STEP_TYPE, CATEGORY, CODE, LABEL, EMOJI FROM STORY_CODE_MASTER SCM WHERE SCM.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SCM.STEP_TYPE, CATEGORY, CODE

SELECT sp.story_id , sp.page_number , sp.phase , sp.image_prompt , sp.image_url , sp.raw_content as TEXT , sp.refined_content as refinedText FROM STORY_PAGES SP WHERE SP.STORY_ID = #{storyId}::BIGINT order by sp.page_number asc

SELECT SC.MASTER_ID::TEXT as STORY_ID , SM.TITLE , SC.SUMMARY , SC.IS_VERIFIED , SC.TAGS , SC.act_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.act_code and use_yn = 'Y') as act_desc , SC.char_code, ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.char_code and use_yn = 'Y') as char_desc , SC.com_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.com_code and use_yn = 'Y') as com_desc , SC.eve_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.eve_code and use_yn = 'Y') as eve_desc , SC.mod_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.mod_code and use_yn = 'Y') as mod_desc , SC.pla_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.pla_code and use_yn = 'Y') as pla_desc , SC.pro_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.pro_code and use_yn = 'Y') as pro_desc , SC.sol_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.sol_code and use_yn = 'Y') as sol_desc , SC.end_code , ( select label from story_code_master where code = sc.end_code and use_yn = 'Y') as end_desc , SC.created_at ,( SELECT JSON_AGG( JSON_BUILD_OBJECT( 'char_img', cp.url_img , 'story_id', SP.STORY_ID::TEXT, 'page_id', SP.ID::TEXT, 'page_no', SP.PAGE_NUMBER, 'content', SP.RAW_CONTENT, 'refined_text', SP.REFINED_CONTENT, 'image_url', SP.IMAGE_URL, 'image_prompt', SP.IMAGE_PROMPT ) ORDER BY SP.PAGE_NUMBER asc -- 페이지 순서대로 정렬 ) FROM STORY_PAGES SP WHERE SP.STORY_ID = SC.MASTER_ID ) as PAGES FROM STORY_CONTENT SC JOIN STORY_MASTER SM ON SC.MASTER_ID = SM.ID JOIN CHARACTER_PROMPT CP ON CP.CHAR_ID = SC.CHAR_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND SC.IS_VERIFIED = true
AND SC.IS_VERIFIED = false
AND SC.MASTER_ID::TEXT = #{storyId}
ORDER BY SC.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE STORY_CONTENT set IS_VERIFIED = true WHERE 1=1 AND MASTER_ID::TEXT = #{storyId}

UPDATE STORY_PAGES set IMAGE_PROMPT = COALESCE(#{imagePrompt}, IMAGE_PROMPT) , IMAGE_URL = COALESCE(#{imageUrl}, IMAGE_URL) , RAW_CONTENT = COALESCE(#{content}, RAW_CONTENT) WHERE 1=1 AND ID::TEXT = #{pageId} AND STORY_ID::TEXT = #{storyId}
